title: 菊花賞の後に・見よ！キタサン祭り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black performs well at the Kikuka Sho.
The fans were so enthralled with her running that
Brusquement's absence went largely unnoticed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon seeing Kitasan Black's fantastic race,
Sakura Bakushin O realizes her job as mentor is
complete and takes leave of her role.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, as if resonating with and echoing Kitasan
Black's incredible performance, Satono Diamond
claims victory in her own debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's next goal is the Arima Kinen. In
order to realize her dream of reuniting with
Satono Diamond on that illustrious stage, she
charges forth on her own.
